# init(from:forSourceModel:destinationModel:)

**Initializer**

Returns the mapping model that will translate data from the source to the destination model.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(from bundles: [Bundle]?, forSourceModel sourceModel: NSManagedObjectModel?, destinationModel: NSManagedObjectModel?)
```

## Parameters

- **bundles**: An array of bundles in which to search for mapping models.
- **sourceModel**: The managed object model for the source store.
- **destinationModel**: The managed object model for the destination store.

## Return Value

Returns the mapping model to translate data from `sourceModel` to `destinationModel`. If a suitable mapping model cannot be found, returns `nil`.

## Discussion

This method is a companion to the [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSManagedObjectModel/mergedModel(from:)] and [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSManagedObjectModel/mergedModel(from:forStoreMetadata:)] methods. In this case, the framework uses the version information from the models to locate the appropriate mapping model in the available bundles.

## Related Documentation

- **Core Data Model Versioning and Data Migration Programming Guide**

## Creating a Mapping

- **inferredMappingModel(forSourceModel:destinationModel:)**: Returns a newly created mapping model that will migrate data from the source to the destination model.
- **init(contentsOf:)**: Returns a mapping model initialized from a given URL.
